executor-api/package.json.summary: Package manifest for chatbot executor API with dependencies Express, ESLint, CORS, and Nodemon, scripts for start and dev modes, and engine requirement Node >=18.

executor-api/server.js.summary: A Node.js Express server providing authenticated POST endpoints for syntax checking and linting JavaScript files, using ESLint and a token from environment variable RAILWAY_AUTH_TOKEN.

index.html.summary: HTML entry point for a Self-Recursive Bot React application with mobile-responsive styles, import maps for React, ReactDOM, and Zustand libraries.

netlify.toml.summary: Netlify configuration defining build commands and edge function proxies for DeepSeek, OpenRouter, Firecrawl, LangSearch, executor, and GitHub token endpoints with CORS headers for a specific origin.

keywords.json.summary: A JSON file that maps other file paths to their keywords and summary, used for indexing the project codebase.

netlify/edge-functions/deepseek-proxy.js.summary: Proxies POST requests to DeepSeek's chat completions API, supporting both streaming (SSE) and non-streaming responses, using DEEPSEEK_API_KEY from environment.

netlify/edge-functions/executor-proxy.js.summary: Forwards POST requests to a configurable Railway API endpoint (RAILWAY_API_URL) with an auth token, extracting the URL suffix from the request path.

netlify/edge-functions/firecrawl-proxy.j.summary: Proxies POST requests to Firecrawl's search API, mapping results to a standard format with title, URL, snippet, and site name.

netlify/edge-functions/github-token-prox.summary: Securely exposes the GITHUB_PAT environment variable via a GET endpoint, with CORS headers and error handling if missing.

netlify/edge-functions/langsearch-proxy..summary: Proxies POST requests to Langsearch's web search API, forwarding the request body and returning the JSON response.

netlify/edge-functions/openrouter-proxy..summary: A Netlify Edge Function that proxies POST requests to OpenRouter's chat completions API, supporting streaming responses and passing along authentication and origin headers.

netlify/inject-preview-bypass.js.summary: A build-time script that injects a JavaScript snippet into index.html to hide a login gate and reveal the root element when running in a Netlify deploy preview context.

preferences.json.summary: A JSON configuration file for a self-improving bot, defining custom prompts, planning rules, code style preferences, and review strictness settings.

src/components/SimpleChat.js.summary: A React component that implements a simple chat interface with message list, task list, input bar, toast notifications, and a pending command queue, using custom stores for workspace and provider state.

src/components/SimpleChat/Header.js.summary: A React header component for the chat interface, displaying the bot title, repo and branch inputs, and action buttons, with responsive styling for mobile and desktop.

src/components/SimpleChat/InputBar.js.summary: Component that renders a text input and send button with responsive styling based on window width.

src/components/SimpleChat/MessageList.js.summary: Component that displays a scrollable list of chat messages with distinct styles for user and agent, handling mobile responsiveness.

src/components/SimpleChat/TaskList.js.summary: Component that renders a scrollable task list with colored status indicators and responsive design.

src/components/SimpleChat/Toaster.js.summary: Component that displays a fixed-position toast notification with color-coded border based on type (error or success).

src/core/SelfImprover.js.summary: Main orchestrator class for self-improvement runs with hierarchical task decomposition, persistent memory, and integration with LLM, GitHub, and other services.

src/core/WorkingMemory.js.summary: WorkingMemory accumulates information from an agentic run with file summaries and notes, and builds a compact context for LLM prompts.

src/core/agenticExecutor.js.summary: agenticExecutor executes a single task via a read-before-write loop with up to 8 turns, integrating context building, safe comment stripping, and a pre-commit quality gate.

src/core/agenticPlanner.js.summary: agenticPlanner explores a codebase to plan a change by reading files in turns, using an LLM to decide next actions until done.

src/core/chunkedIndexer.js.summary: chunkedIndexer builds a keyword index for large repos by processing files in groups of 5, extracting keywords and summaries, and committing results.

src/core/clarification.js.summary: clarification.js generates clarifying questions with a timeout (30s), returning original goal if no user response, using LLM to produce questions based on goal and preferences.

src/core/coordinatedPlanner.js.summary: Exports a coordinatedPlan function that groups candidate files by top-level directory, launches parallel exploration agents per directory, and then a coordinator agent merges the summaries into a single plan with optional subGoal for hierarchical execution.

src/core/fileDiscovery.js.summary: Discovers relevant files by loading a keywords.json index from the repo and scoring files based on matching goal words, with a fallback to filename scanning.

src/core/hierarchicalPlanner.js.summary: Extends planners by decomposing complex goals into sub-goals using an LLM-based decision, then creating a hierarchical plan with tasks and dependencies.

src/core/keywordIndexer.js.summary: Indexes slash commands and provides fuzzy matching using Levenshtein distance, prefix, and exact match algorithms to find the best command.

src/core/manifestManager.js.summary: Ensures a manifest.json exists by loading it from the repo or building it from JavaScript source files using ManifestBuilder.

src/core/parallelExec.js.summary: Executes pending tasks concurrently with a configurable max concurrency, using file-locking to avoid conflicts and delegating each task to executeTaskAgentic.

src/core/persistentMemory.js.summary: Provides functions to serialize and persist the working memory to a JSON file in the repo, scoped by a runId to prevent overwrites, and includes saving run summaries.

src/core/planner.js.summary: Generates a plan for a given goal by using an LLM to analyze relevant files (from discovery or file tree) and returns a structured JSON plan with tasks.

src/core/prCreator.js.summary: Creates a GitHub pull request with a title based on the goal and returns the PR URL.

src/core/reviewer.js.summary: Reviews each completed task by comparing original and committed file contents, enforcing goal alignment, and reporting issues per line.

src/core/taskQueue.js.summary: Manages a task queue with statuses (TODO, DONE, FAILED) and provides functions to initialize, find, and update task status.

src/main.js.summary: Entry point that initializes core services (GitHub, LLM, executor, context builder, agent skills, smoke test, SelfImprover) and loads GitHub token from Netlify environment.

src/services/PreferencesService.js.summary: Service for loading and saving agent preferences (preferences.json) from a GitHub repository, with fallback defaults.

src/services/conversationMemory.js.summary: Stores structured conversation context (goal, phase, decisions, failed attempts) across runs in localStorage for persistence.

src/services/errorIngestion.js.summary: Parses error stack traces to extract file paths and line numbers, then builds a context string for the planner.

src/services/executorApi.js.summary: ExecutorAPI class communicates with Railway-based executor via Netlify edge proxy, with fail-open on network errors.

src/services/github.js.summary: GitHubService provides static methods for fetching file tree, loading file content, and committing multiple files to a GitHub repository using GitHub API.

src/services/llmProvider.js.summary: LLMProvider handles chat completion calls to DeepSeek or OpenRouter through Netlify edge proxies with configurable timeout and thinking mode support.

src/services/smokeTest.js.summary: SmokeTest polls a Netlify deploy-preview URL until the page renders correctly or times out, used for verifying deployments.

src/stores/providerStore.js.summary: Zustand store with localStorage persistence for managing AI provider settings including model selection, thinking mode, and reasoning effort.

src/stores/workspaceStore.js.summary: Defines a Zustand store with persistence for workspace settings like repository, branch, GitHub token, and remember keys flag.

src/utils/agentSkills.js.summary: Extracts update and file read operations from AI response using regex skills tags for editor processing.

src/utils/contextBuilder.js.summary: Builds a prompt context by selecting target and related files from a dependency manifest, limiting by file count and token budget.

src/utils/sandboxTest.js.summary: Runs code in a sandboxed iframe with injected dependencies, performing a health check on SelfImprover instance within timeout.

src/utils/stripComments.js.summary: stripComments removes JS/CSS comments and blank lines to reduce prompt size, using regex replacements for block comments, line comments, and blank lines.
